topic: [cs] Large-scale image caption dataset creation and standardized evaluation of automatic caption generation algorithms.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Provide five independent human captions for training/validation images and an evaluation server scoring candidate captions with BLEU, METEOR, ROUGE, and CIDEr.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Large-scale image caption dataset creation and standardized evaluation of automatic caption generation algorithms.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The planned dataset scale is over 1.5 million captions for over 330,000 images, with five human captions for training and validation images.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: The dataset was not yet complete at publication; its stated scale is described as a future completed state.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: An evaluation server using popular caption metrics can ensure consistent evaluation of automatic caption generation algorithms.

topic: [mathematics] Gradient-based tuning of learning-algorithm hyperparameters for cross-validation performance, including schedules, initialization distributions, regularization schemes, and neural network architectures.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Chain derivatives backwards through the entire training procedure, exactly reversing stochastic gradient descent with momentum to compute hyperparameter gradients.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Gradient-based tuning of learning-algorithm hyperparameters for cross-validation performance, including schedules, initialization distributions, regularization schemes, and neural network architectures.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Exact hyperparameter gradients make it possible to optimize thousands of hyperparameters previously difficult to tune because gradients were usually unavailable.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Changed hyperparameter optimization from gradient-unavailable tuning to exact gradient computation through reversible learning dynamics.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Exact gradients of cross-validation performance with respect to all hyperparameters can be computed by reversing stochastic gradient descent with momentum.

topic: [cs] Reading-comprehension question answering for reasoning and natural-language dialogue agents, including chaining facts, induction, and deduction.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: A suite of prerequisite proxy question-answering tasks plus an extended Memory Networks model to evaluate reasoning skills in reading comprehension.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Reading-comprehension question answering for reasoning and natural-language dialogue agents, including chaining facts, induction, and deduction.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Extended Memory Networks solve some benchmark toy tasks but fail on others, indicating separable reasoning skill gaps.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Many existing learning systems likely cannot solve the full task set; the improved Memory Networks model remains incomplete.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Introduces classified prerequisite QA toy tasks and extends/improves the recently introduced Memory Networks model.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: A system capable of human-like conversation should be able to solve this prerequisite set of reading-comprehension question-answering tasks.

topic: [cs] Predicting masses, mass ratios, redshift distribution, and local merger rates of binary black holes formed in globular clusters.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Monte Carlo globular-cluster simulations incorporating stellar dynamics, binary formation, encounters, and updated metallicity-dependent stellar wind/supernova prescriptions to model binary black hole formation and mergers.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Predicting masses, mass ratios, redshift distribution, and local merger rates of binary black holes formed in globular clusters.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Local globular-cluster merger rate is ~5 Gpc^-3 yr^-1; 80% of sources have total masses 32-64 solar masses; about one in seven local mergers originate in globular clusters.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Results are sensitive to assumptions for binary stellar evolution; the paper explores rather than eliminates that modeling uncertainty.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Expands Rodriguez et al. 2015 with 52 cluster models spanning mass, metallicity, and radius plus updated metallicity-dependent stellar wind and supernova prescriptions.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Under standard assumptions, approximately one out of every seven binary black hole mergers in the local universe originates in a globular cluster.

topic: [biology] Unsupervised training of increasingly general problem solvers over computable tasks with possibly computable solutions.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Continually search pairs of self-invented tasks and solver modifications, validating the first compact/fast pair where the modified solver solves all old tasks plus a new one that its predecessor cannot.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Unsupervised training of increasingly general problem solvers over computable tasks with possibly computable solutions.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Ordering candidate task/solver pairs by conditional computational complexity biases discovery toward compact, quickly validated novelties; validation costs need not grow with the task repertoire.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: A first experimental analysis is deferred to separate papers, leaving this text primarily as an algorithmic framework.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Instead of solving given tasks, PowerPlay automatically invents the simplest still-unsolvable task and corresponding solver modification while preserving all prior learned abilities.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: PowerPlay can train a more general solver from scratch by repeatedly finding a task/solver modification that solves all prior tasks plus a new task the predecessor cannot solve.

topic: [cs] Detecting implicit semantic biases in human language corpora, including associations involving race, gender, career, family, flowers, and insects.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Apply a purely statistical machine-learning word-association model to ordinary Web text corpora to recover semantic associations comparable to IAT-measured human biases.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Detecting implicit semantic biases in human language corpora, including associations involving race, gender, career, family, flowers, and insects.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Text corpora contain recoverable, accurate imprints of historic human biases, spanning neutral, problematic, and status-quo gender distributions.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: The paper frames bias identification and addressing as future promise, but the provided text does not specify interventions for mitigating recovered biases.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Shifted implicit-bias measurement from human IAT responses to automatically learned word associations from standard Web-scale text corpora.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: A statistical model trained on ordinary human language corpora can reproduce a spectrum of human-like implicit semantic biases measured by the IAT.

topic: [corpus] Migraine pathophysiology, specifically whether cortical spreading depression waves underlie headache in both migraine with aura and migraine without aura.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Analyze transient cortical wave patterns in a canonical reaction-diffusion model with mean field inhibition, driven by ghost behavior near a saddle-node bifurcation.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Migraine pathophysiology, specifically whether cortical spreading depression waves underlie headache in both migraine with aura and migraine without aura.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Wave-form statistics align with migraine subtype prevalence; maximal instantaneous affected cortical area is anticorrelated with SD duration and total affected cortical area.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Transient brain dynamics remain mathematically difficult and clinically hard to observe; the SD-headache causal relationship is explicitly described as controversial.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Extends cortical spreading depression from migraine with aura to migraine without aura, reframing silent aura as transient wave patterns below aura-reporting conditions.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Cortical spreading depression waves causally contribute to headache in both migraine with aura and migraine without aura.

topic: [cs] Sequence processing requiring attention to recent past inputs without storing explicit copies of neural activity patterns.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Use fast weights as variables changing slower than neural activities but faster than standard weights to store temporary memories and attend to the recent past.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Sequence processing requiring attention to recent past inputs without storing explicit copies of neural activity patterns.

gold_proposal.delta_genome: Adds fast synaptic variables between neural activities and standard weights, replacing explicit stored activity copies with temporary memory in fast weights.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Fast weights can provide a neurally plausible attention mechanism for recent past information while avoiding stored copies of neural activity patterns.

topic: [cs] Complex reinforcement-learning tasks where reward functions are unavailable or hard to specify, including Atari games, simulated robot locomotion, and novel behavior training.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Learn a reward signal from non-expert human preference comparisons between pairs of trajectory segments, then use it to train RL agents without direct access to the environment reward.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Complex reinforcement-learning tasks where reward functions are unavailable or hard to specify, including Atari games, simulated robot locomotion, and novel behavior training.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The approach solved complex RL tasks with human feedback on less than one percent of agent-environment interactions and could train novel behaviors with about an hour of human time.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: The work is motivated by the unresolved need to communicate complex goals to sophisticated RL systems interacting with real-world environments.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Compared with prior human-feedback learning, it scales to considerably more complex behaviors and environments while using sparse non-expert preference feedback.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: RL agents can solve complex tasks without access to reward functions by learning from sparse non-expert human preferences over trajectory segment pairs.

topic: [cs] Deep neural network vulnerability to adversarial examples: inputs nearly indistinguishable from natural data but classified incorrectly.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Frame adversarial robustness as robust optimization to derive reliable training and attack methods, including security against first-order adversaries.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Deep neural network vulnerability to adversarial examples: inputs nearly indistinguishable from natural data but classified incorrectly.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Robust optimization unifies prior work and enables networks with significantly improved resistance to a wide range of adversarial attacks.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Robustness against first-order adversaries is only a stepping stone toward fully resistant deep learning models.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Moves from ad hoc adversarial defenses toward a principled robust-optimization framework specifying a concrete security guarantee against broad adversary classes.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Training neural networks via robust optimization yields significantly improved resistance to a wide range of adversarial attacks.

topic: [biology] Automatic synthesis of realistic images from detailed text descriptions, demonstrated on birds and flowers.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: A novel deep architecture and GAN formulation bridges recurrent text representations with deep convolutional GAN image generation, translating visual concepts from characters to pixels.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Automatic synthesis of realistic images from detailed text descriptions, demonstrated on birds and flowers.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The model can generate plausible images of birds and flowers from detailed text descriptions.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Current AI systems are still far from automatic synthesis of realistic images from text.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: It combines recent discriminative recurrent text feature learning with deep convolutional GAN image synthesis to connect text and image modeling.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: A GAN architecture conditioned on learned text representations can generate plausible bird and flower images from detailed textual descriptions.

We use the gate to generate entangled states with a maximal extracted concurrence of 0.88, and quantum process tomography reveals a gate fidelity of 81%.

topic: [cs] Large-scale probabilistic prediction requiring calibrated probabilities for machine-learning outputs.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Turns machine-learning algorithms into computationally efficient probabilistic predictors with automatic validity, producing imprecise probabilities that can be merged into precise probabilities.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Large-scale probabilistic prediction requiring calibrated probabilities for machine-learning outputs.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Merged precise probabilities lose perfect-calibration guarantees but are empirically consistently more accurate than existing methods.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Perfect calibration requires imprecise probabilities, even if they are almost precise for large data sets.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Compared with existing methods, it introduces valid imprecise probabilistic predictors and a merge-to-precise variant that improves empirical accuracy while sacrificing guaranteed calibration.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: A computationally efficient transformation of machine-learning algorithms can yield valid imprecise probabilistic predictors, and merging them into precise probabilities produces empirically more accurate predictors than existing methods.

topic: [cs] Discovering and characterizing Kepler transiting ultra-short-period planets with orbital periods shorter than one day.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Compute Fourier transforms of Kepler photometric time series for 200,000 stars and identify transits from regularly spaced sharp spectral peaks.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Discovering and characterizing Kepler transiting ultra-short-period planets with orbital periods shorter than one day.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: USP planets are usually smaller than 2 R⊕ and often have 1–50 day planetary companions, unlike hot Jupiters.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: False positives from eclipsing stellar systems remain a central concern; 26 previously reported USP candidates failed the authors’ tests.

gold_proposal.claim_genome: USP planets occur around approximately 0.51% of G-dwarf stars and 0.83% of K-dwarf stars.

topic: [cs] Constraining intergalactic magnetic fields and turbulence in the cosmic web using fast radio bursts as cosmological probes.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Use a bright, polarized FRB’s wavelength-dependent Faraday rotation plus dispersion delay and scintillation to infer line-of-sight magnetic field and intergalactic turbulence.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Constraining intergalactic magnetic fields and turbulence in the cosmic web using fast radio bursts as cosmological probes.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: FRB 150807 was mildly dispersed, exceptionally intense, linearly polarized, scintillating, and showed low Faraday rotation, implying weak cosmic-web magnetization and weak intergalactic turbulence.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: FRB-source uncertainty and propagation through intervening plasma limit use as cosmological probes; interpretation assumes the FRB originates from a colocated galaxy.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: An exceptionally bright FRB enabled direct localization and polarization/Faraday measurements sufficient to constrain the intergalactic magnetic field along one sightline.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: FRB 150807 constrains the net line-of-sight magnetization of the cosmic web along its sightline to less than 21 nanogauss.

topic: [cs] Long-period exoplanet candidates at orbital distances larger than 1 AU in Kepler systems, especially candidates with only one or two visible transits.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Planet Hunters searched Kepler Q0–Q17 archival transits, estimated single-transit periods from transit duration and stellar properties, and used follow-up imaging/spectroscopy to validate and characterize host stars.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Long-period exoplanet candidates at orbital distances larger than 1 AU in Kepler systems, especially candidates with only one or two visible transits.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The study found 41 candidates in 38 systems, with 75% at 1–3 AU, validated 7 planets, and observed frequent long-period transit timing variations up to 41 hr.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Single-transit orbital periods are estimated, close stellar companions can create blends, and dynamically interacting components require follow-up radial velocity and transit observations.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: It expands the incomplete >1 AU exoplanet census by adding 41 long-period Planet Hunters candidates from Kepler Q0–Q17 and validating 7 with follow-up characterization.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Kepler archival data contain a substantial population of long-period transiting planet candidates, including statistically validated planets at wide separations with measurable false-positive rates.

topic: [cs] Finite-sample performance analysis and improved algorithms for gradient TD reinforcement learning methods, especially off-policy learning.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Derive GTD methods as stochastic gradients of primal-dual saddle-point objectives, then analyze saddle-point error and add proximal mirror-map variants.

topic: [cs] Fast, accurate characterization of short-duration non-astrophysical transient noise in advanced LIGO/Virgo gravitational-wave detector data.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Apply three transient-noise classifiers—PCAT, PC-LIB, and WDF-ML—with improvements for higher performance and lower latency on real Advanced LIGO data.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Fast, accurate characterization of short-duration non-astrophysical transient noise in advanced LIGO/Virgo gravitational-wave detector data.

topic: [physics] Dynamics simulation of strongly thermalizing 1D quantum systems across near-equilibrium and far-from-equilibrium initial states.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: DMT approximates density operators of 1D systems and is combined with TEBD time evolution to simulate dynamics.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Dynamics simulation of strongly thermalizing 1D quantum systems across near-equilibrium and far-from-equilibrium initial states.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The method performs well for Gibbs states with spatially varying temperatures, quenches across phase transitions, and pure states.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Adds DMT density-operator approximation to the standard TEBD time-evolution framework, enabling simulations of strongly thermalizing systems to arbitrary times.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: DMT combined with TEBD makes it possible to simulate the dynamics of strongly thermalizing 1D systems to arbitrary times.

topic: [physics] Precision cosmology and dark-energy tests using LSST survey data products across multiple astrophysical probes.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Deep-wide-fast six-passband LSST imaging coupled to interlocking cosmological probes: large-scale structure, weak lensing, type Ia supernovae, galaxy clusters, strong lensing, and CMB combinations.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Precision cosmology and dark-energy tests using LSST survey data products across multiple astrophysical probes.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: LSST’s anticipated high-quality data volume is presented as enabling precision cosmology with unprecedented statistical power and tighter systematic-error control.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: The program depends on managing systematics and on close collaborations with contemporaneous imaging and spectroscopy surveys for more complete multi-wavelength understanding.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Compared with prior survey capability, LSST adds deep-wide-fast imaging, six passbands, 800 main-survey visits, no proprietary period, and unprecedented statistical power for cosmology.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: LSST data, combined with CMB observations, will enable interlocking tests that constrain the cosmological model and the nature of dark energy under systematic uncertainties.

topic: [biology] Generalization degradation in large-batch training for deep learning models trained with SGD or variants.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Numerically compare small- and large-batch SGD behavior to relate batch size, gradient-estimation noise, minimizer sharpness, and generalization.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Generalization degradation in large-batch training for deep learning models trained with SGD or variants.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Large-batch methods tend to reach sharp minima with poorer generalization, while small-batch methods consistently reach flat minima.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Large-batch training still shows a generalization gap; remedies are presented only as strategies to attempt to eliminate it.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Shifts focus from standard small-batch SGD practice to diagnosing why larger batches degrade generalization via sharp versus flat minima.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Large-batch deep learning training generalizes worse because it tends to converge to sharp minimizers, unlike noisy small-batch training that converges to flat minimizers.

topic: [cs] Agile, high-speed off-road autonomous driving using only low-cost sensors.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: End-to-end deep imitation learning trains a neural control policy to imitate a model predictive controller, mapping raw observations directly to continuous steering and throttle commands.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Agile, high-speed off-road autonomous driving using only low-cost sensors.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Online imitation learning overcomes covariate shift and generalizes better than batch imitation learning, enabling successful high-speed off-road driving.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Batch imitation learning faces covariate shift; no other explicit weakness or future-work pressure is stated.

topic: [cs] Safe exploration for Markov decision processes with uncertain dynamics, especially non-ergodic physical systems where unsafe exploration can break the system.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Formulate safety via ergodicity, then use an efficient constrained optimization algorithm that restricts policies to a safe subset while favoring exploration bonuses.

gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Guaranteed safe exploration may be suboptimal because the efficient algorithm restricts attention to only a subset of guaranteed safe policies.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Unlike prior exploration algorithms relying on ergodicity and rare-state bonuses, this work explicitly constrains exploration to guaranteed safe policies.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Constrained safe-exploration optimization in MDPs can guarantee safety while outperforming classical exploration methods on relevant tasks.

topic: [cs] Principal component analysis requiring low-rank approximation of data matrices, especially when rank-deficient approximations can only achieve a few digits of relative spectral-norm accuracy.

gold_proposal.claim_genome: The proposed algorithm efficiently produces low-rank matrix approximations with accuracy very close to the best possible for matrices of arbitrary sizes.

topic: [cs] Mathematical modeling of tumor growth dynamics, including cell density evolution and nutrient supply through vasculature.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Formulate a Hele–Shaw-type free boundary tumor-growth model with growth terms by deriving it from cell-level mechanics via the stiff limit of the pressure law.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Mathematical modeling of tumor growth dynamics, including cell density evolution and nutrient supply through vasculature.

gold_proposal.claim_genome: A complete Hele–Shaw asymptotic description of these mechanical tumor-growth models requires both pressure-driven free-boundary motion and the cell number density equation.

topic: [cs] Adiabatic quantum computing paths of nondegenerate eigenstates, including discrete-time unitary families, unstructured search, quantum sampling, and quantum simulated annealing.

topic: [mathematics] Team optimal control for stochastic coupled subsystems where each controller observes its local state and the population mean-field.

topic: [physics] Whether quantum polynomial time can efficiently solve all of NP, especially oracle-relative NP and NP∩coNP decision problems.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Random-oracle and random-permutation oracle lower-bound proofs for quantum Turing machines, showing required query/runtime growth for solving NP and NP∩coNP.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Whether quantum polynomial time can efficiently solve all of NP, especially oracle-relative NP and NP∩coNP decision problems.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Quantum computers do not generically collapse NP under random oracles; NP needs o(2^{n/2})-excluding time, and NP∩coNP needs o(2^{n/3})-excluding time.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: The NP random-oracle lower bound is tight because Grover gives an O(2^{n/2}) quantum algorithm relative to any oracle.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Moved from quantum speedup results for factoring, discrete logarithms, and search to oracle-relative limits on quantum computation for NP and NP∩coNP.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Relative to uniformly random oracles, quantum Turing machines cannot solve NP in time o(2^{n/2}) and cannot solve NP∩coNP under random permutation oracles in time o(2^{n/3}).

topic: [cs] Representing model uncertainty for deep-learning regression and classification, including MNIST and deep reinforcement learning settings.

topic: [physics] Scalable universal quantum computation in the presence of local noise, gate/qubit errors, inaccuracies, and correlated errors.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Recursively encode quantum circuits using CSS/polynomial QECCs with transversal encoded gates, repeated polyloglog times to suppress effective error rates under local noise.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Scalable universal quantum computation in the presence of local noise, gate/qubit errors, inaccuracies, and correlated errors.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Local noise is not a fundamental barrier if physical error probability is below a constant threshold; overhead is only polylogarithmic in time and space.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Estimated best-case threshold is low, about 10^-6, making practicality dependent on achieving very small physical error rates.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Replaces Shor’s polylogarithmically decaying error-rate requirement with a constant error-rate threshold and supplies complete universality proofs.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: If the physical error probability η per qubit or gate is below constant ηc, universal quantum computation can be made fault-tolerant with polylogarithmic overhead under general local noise.

topic: [mathematics] Large-scale stochastic statistical optimization over datasets too large for one computer in distributed asynchronous systems.

topic: [corpus] Abatement of spike-wave epileptic seizures using active single-pulse brain stimulation.

topic: [mathematics] Off-policy evaluation: estimating a target policy’s value from data collected by another policy under the contextual bandit model.

gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Without access to a consistent reward model, the agnostic contextual setting is intrinsically difficult, limiting improvements over IPS and DR in minimax MSE to constant factors.

gold_proposal.claim_genome: SWITCH achieves a better MSE bias-variance tradeoff than IPS and DR and often substantially improves empirical off-policy evaluation performance.

topic: [cs] Selecting appropriate metrics for fingerprint-based molecular similarity calculations in cheminformatics across molecule size, selection method, and data pretreatment variation.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Compare eight similarity/distance metrics on many 100-compound fingerprint datasets by ranking compounds against random references; evaluate rankings using SRD and factor effects using ANOVA.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Selecting appropriate metrics for fingerprint-based molecular similarity calculations in cheminformatics across molecule size, selection method, and data pretreatment variation.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Tanimoto, Dice, Cosine, and Soergel were best and broadly equivalent, producing rankings closest to the composite average of all eight metrics.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Euclidean- and Manhattan-derived similarity metrics are not recommended alone, though their variability may be useful for data fusion.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Unlike prior specific-scenario comparisons, this study used a general design that avoided a priori compound knowledge and bias from examining only one or few scenarios.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: In large-scale fingerprint-based molecular similarity ranking, the Tanimoto index is among the best metrics because it yields rankings closest to the composite ranking of tested metrics.

topic: [biology] Consistent quantum-chemical property data for stable small organic molecules up to nine heavy atoms within GDB-17, supporting benchmarking, machine learning, and structure-property studies.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Compute optimized geometries, vibrational, electronic, and thermodynamic properties for enumerated small CHONF molecules using B3LYP/6-31G(2df,p), plus G4MP2 atomization thermochemistry for C7H10O2 isomers.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Consistent quantum-chemical property data for stable small organic molecules up to nine heavy atoms within GDB-17, supporting benchmarking, machine learning, and structure-property studies.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: A 134k-molecule CHONF subset of GDB-17 was characterized; 6,095 C7H10O2 constitutional isomers received higher-accuracy G4MP2 atomization energies, enthalpies, and free energies.
gold_proposal.limitation_genome: Chemical compound space remains mostly uncharted because it scales combinatorially with molecular size; the dataset covers only stable CHONF molecules with up to nine heavy atoms.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Moved from enumerated GDB-17 chemical space to computed quantum-chemical structures and properties for all 133,885 species with up to nine heavy atoms in the CHONF subset.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: The dataset provides a relevant, consistent, and comprehensive quantum-chemical property resource for small organic molecules that can benchmark methods and enable structure-property discovery.

topic: [neuroscience] Policy learning/control in stochastic dynamical systems, including challenging model-based reinforcement learning benchmarks and real-world gas turbine control.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Model-based reinforcement learning combining Bayesian neural networks trained by minimizing alpha-divergences with random roll-outs and stochastic optimization for policy learning.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Policy learning/control in stochastic dynamical systems, including challenging model-based reinforcement learning benchmarks and real-world gas turbine control.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: The method solves a challenging benchmark where model-based approaches usually fail and achieves promising real-world gas turbine control results.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: Replaces common transition models with alpha-divergence-trained Bayesian neural networks that capture multi-modality and heteroskedasticity usually missed by other approaches.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Alpha-divergence-trained Bayesian neural dynamics models combined with random roll-outs and stochastic policy optimization improve model-based reinforcement learning on difficult stochastic control tasks.

topic: [neuroscience] Historical understanding of deep artificial neural networks for pattern recognition and machine learning.

gold_proposal.mechanism_genome: Define deep learning via credit-assignment path depth, then synthesize supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement/evolutionary, and indirect program-search approaches for deep and large neural networks.
gold_proposal.niche_genome: Historical understanding of deep artificial neural networks for pattern recognition and machine learning.
gold_proposal.observation_genome: Deep artificial neural networks, including recurrent networks, had recently achieved contest-winning performance in pattern recognition and machine learning.
gold_proposal.delta_genome: It reframes earlier work through credit-assignment path depth while compactly surveying relevant deep-learning history, including much work from the previous millennium.
gold_proposal.claim_genome: Deep and shallow learners can be distinguished by the depth of their credit-assignment paths.
